cards.rules_text:
Sacralize [i](When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.)[/i]
Whenever this creature or another creature you control leaves the battlefield, you gain 1 life. If this creature was sacralized, you gain 3 life instead.

Once each turn, when you gain life, you may untap up to one target creature you control.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, you gain 1 life.

Lifelink
When this creature dies, revere. [i](Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)[/i]

When this creature enters, revere. [i](Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)[/i]

Sacralize [i](When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.)[/i]
Whenever another creature you control leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white XXX creature token. 
Warp {W} [i](You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)[/i]

Flying
Creatures you control with power 2 or less have vigilance.
Creatures you don't control with power 4 or greater can't block.

Vigilance
Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 for each other creature you control with power 2 or less until end of turn.

Sacralize [i](When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it.)[/i]
When this creature is sacralized, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

When this creature enters or dies, create two 1/1 XXX white creature tokens with lifelink.
[i]Augury[/i] — Whenever this creature attacks, if you exiled a card this turn, it gets +1/+1 for each creature you control.
[i]Augury[/i] — This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If you exiled a card this turn, it deals 5 damage instead.

Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until end of turn.
Revere. [i](Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)[/i]

When this enchantment enters, exile target creature you don't control until this enchantment leave the battlefield.
[i]Augury[/i] — At the beginning of each end step, if you exiled a card this turn, you gain 1 life.

Enchant creature

Whenever enchanted creature attacks, you gain 1 life.

Exile target tapped creature.

Defender
[i]Augury[/i] — As long as you've exiled a card this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

Whenever this creature attacks, mill two cards.
{3}{U}, Exile three other cards from your graveyard: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

Once during each of your turns, when a card leaves your graveyard, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn.
{3}{U}: Surveil 1, then draw a card and discard a card.
Whenever a creature you control enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
When this creature enters, mill four cards, then return up to one noncreature card milled this way to your hand.

When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards.

Warp {1}{U} [i](You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)[/i]

Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controllers untap step.

Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If they do, revere. [i](Put a Celestial card you own from outside the game into your hand or graveyard. If a card wasn't put into your hand, create a Clue token.)[/i]
